methods.name: defi_services.jobs.queriers.call_state_querier.CallStateQuerier.query_state_data
documentation:
Args:
    queries: dict - defi state queries
        - key: str - id of query
        - value: dict - input of query
            {
                address: str - address of contract
                abi: list - abi of contract,
                function: str - name of the function,
                params: list - list parameters of function,
                block_number: int - the block number saving the state data
            }
    batch_size: int - number of query in each batch queries
    workers: int - maximum number of vCPU used in queries
    ignore_error: bool - ignore error when decode result or not

Return:
    + A dictionary result of queries
        - key: str - id of query
        - value: result of query

documentation: x axis on the graph must be integers, y value must increase strictly monotonically with increase of x

methods.name: defi_services.utils.graph_operations.GraphOperations.get_bounds_for_y_coordinate
documentation:
given the y coordinate, outputs a pair of x coordinates for closest points that bound the y coordinate.
Left and right bounds are equal in case given y is equal to one of the points y coordinate

methods.name: defi_services.constants.network_constants.Chains.get_abi_name
documentation:
Map chain_id with the corresponding abi key
